results.title: Jaguar XJ220 Returns as Callum Reveals Modern Design Study
results.description: Ian Callum's latest design study reinterprets the iconic Jaguar XJ220 with modern styling, hinting at what could eventually become a production-ready model.

results.title: Wheelchair-Bound Devotee from Barpali Has Divine Darshan in Puri
results.description: #ମ ୋର_ଗୋଡ଼_ନାହିଁ #ଲ ାଗିଲା_ଡୋରି_ଆସିଲି_ପୁରୀ ବରପାଲିରୁ ବଡ଼ଦାଣ୍ଡ। ବଡ଼ଦାଣ୍ଡରେ ଦିବ୍ୟାଙ୍ଗ ଭକ୍ତ। ହ୍ୱିଲ୍ ଚେୟାରରେ ବସି ପରିବାର ଲୋକଙ୍କ ସହିତ କଲେ ଦର୍ଶନ। ତିନି ଠାକୁରଙ୍କ ପାଖରୁ ଦେଖି ଖୁସି ଲାଗିଲା। ଗତ ବର୍ଷ ବାହୁଡାରେ ଆସିଥିଲି, ଚଳିତ ବର୍ଷ ଦେଵ ସ୍ନାନ ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣିମାରେ ଦର୍ଶନ କଲି। କାଳିଆଙ୍କୁ ଦେଖିଲା ପରେ ଭିଡ଼ ଓ ଗରମ ଗୁଳି ଗୁଳି କିଛି ଜଣା ପଡୁନି। #JaiJagannath #Puri #SnanaPurnima #JagannathTemple #DivyangDevotee #BadaDanda #OdishaCulture #SpiritualIndia #HumanInterest_SimanchalBhoi #DevaSnanaPurnima #PuriBadaDanda #JagannathDevotee #DivyangDevotee #JagannathBhakti #SpiritualJourney #PuriFestival #OdishaTV #OTV A differently-abled devotee, Simanchal Bhoi, travelled from Barpali to Puri's Bada Danda to have darshan of Lord Jagannath during Deva Snana Purnima. Arriving in a wheelchair along with family members, the devotee witnessed the divine appearance of the sibling deities and expressed immense joy after receiving darshan. results.title: Inside ISI's two-pronged India strategy: Cash for North, radicalisation in South
results.description: An investigation into the shifting landscape of terror recruitment in India: how groups utilize a two-pronged strategy of financial incentives in the North and ideological radicalization in the South.

results.title: Lord Jagannath’s Sacred Snana Ritual Concludes, Gajanana Besha Darshan Next
results.description: #ସର ିଲା_ସ୍ନାନ_ଏବେ_ହାତୀବେଶ ୧୦୮ ଗରା ସୁବାସିତ ଜଳରେ ସ୍ନାନ କଲେ ଶ୍ରୀଜିଉ । ସରିଲା ଦେବସ୍ନାନ ନୀତି । ଏବେ ଗଜାନନ ବେଶରେ ଅଗଣିତ ଭକ୍ତଙ୍କୁ ଦର୍ଶନ ଦେବେ ମହାପ୍ରଭୁ । #SnanaPurnima #LordJagannath #JagannathTemple #Puri #HolyBath #SnanaYatra #SnanaBedi #otv #odisha For latest news updates follow us on WhatsApp: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaYNIW78qIzrtKKZiD3M OdishaTV is Odisha's no 1 News Channel. results.title: Kidambi Srikanth Falls Short in US Open Semifinals Against Su Li Yang
results.description: In a gripping semifinal match at the US Open Badminton tournament, former World No. 1 Kidambi Srikanth faced off against Su Li Yang from Chinese Taipei. Despite a valiant effort, Srikanth fell short, extending his wait for a BWF World Tour title since 2017. The match showcased intense competition, with both players exchanging leads before Su ultimately secured victory. Srikanth's sportsmanship was also highlighted during the tournament, making this match a memorable chapter in his career. Discover more about the match dynamics and Srikanth's reflections on his performance.
